'''âsh-f-r''' ('''kashafar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telecopy|telecopy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telecopy|telecopy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-f-r
|-
! Lemma
| kashafar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishafar|thishafar]] || [[word:jishafar|jishafar]] || [[word:shishafar|shishafar]] || [[word:kishafar|kishafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushafar|thuthushafar]] || [[word:jujushafar|jujushafar]] || [[word:shushushafar|shushushafar]] || [[word:kukushafar|kukushafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushafar|thushafar]] || [[word:jushafar|jushafar]] || [[word:shushafar|shushafar]] || [[word:kushafar|kushafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushafar|thushafar]] || [[word:jushafar|jushafar]] || [[word:shushafar|shushafar]] || [[word:kushafar|kushafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshafar|theshafar]] || [[word:jeshafar|jeshafar]] || [[word:sheshafar|sheshafar]] || [[word:keshafar|keshafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshafar|thothoshafar]] || [[word:jojoshafar|jojoshafar]] || [[word:shoshoshafar|shoshoshafar]] || [[word:kokoshafar|kokoshafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshafar|thoshafar]] || [[word:joshafar|joshafar]] || [[word:shoshafar|shoshafar]] || [[word:koshafar|koshafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshafar|thoshafar]] || [[word:joshafar|joshafar]] || [[word:shoshafar|shoshafar]] || [[word:koshafar|koshafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshafar|thĂŠshafar]] || [[word:jĂŠshafar|jĂŠshafar]] || [[word:shĂŠshafar|shĂŠshafar]] || [[word:kĂŠshafar|kĂŠshafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashafar|thathashafar]] || [[word:jajashafar|jajashafar]] || [[word:shashashafar|shashashafar]] || [[word:kakashafar|kakashafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashafar|thashafar]] || [[word:jashafar|jashafar]] || [[word:shashafar|shashafar]] || [[word:kashafar|kashafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashafar|thashafar]] || [[word:jashafar|jashafar]] || [[word:shashafar|shashafar]] || [[word:kashafar|kashafar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashafar|shashafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashafar|goshashafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashafar|gokishashafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashafarnĂŒ|shashafarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashafarnknĂŒ|goshashafarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashafarnĂŒ|gokishashafarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashafarshĂ«|shashafarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashafarnkshĂ«|goshashafarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashafarshĂ«|gokishashafarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashafaro|shashafaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashafarnkro|goshashafarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashafaro|gokishashafaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashafarmu|shashafarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashafarnkmu|goshashafarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashafarmu|gokishashafarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashafarsher|shashafarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashafarnksher|goshashafarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashafarsher|gokishashafarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashafarng|shashafarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashafarnkng|goshashafarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashafarng|gokishashafarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashafarya|shashafarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashafarnkya|goshashafarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashafarya|gokishashafarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashafaryam|shashafaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashafarnkyam|goshashafarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashafaryam|gokishashafaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashafarnĂŒshĂ«|shashafarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashafarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashafarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashafarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashafarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashafarnĂŒro|shashafarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashafarnknĂŒro|goshashafarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashafarnĂŒro|gokishashafarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashafarnĂŒmu|shashafarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashafarnknĂŒmu|goshashafarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashafarnĂŒmu|gokishashafarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashafarshĂ«nĂŒ|shashafarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashafarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashafarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashafarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashafarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashafarshĂ«ro|shashafarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashafarnkshĂ«ro|goshashafarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashafarshĂ«ro|gokishashafarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashafarshĂ«mu|shashafarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashafarnkshĂ«mu|goshashafarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashafarshĂ«mu|gokishashafarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashafaronĂŒ|shashafaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashafarnkronĂŒ|goshashafarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashafaronĂŒ|gokishashafaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashafaroshĂ«|shashafaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashafarnkroshĂ«|goshashafarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashafaroshĂ«|gokishashafaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashafaromu|shashafaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashafarnkromu|goshashafarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashafaromu|gokishashafaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashafarmunĂŒ|shashafarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashafarnkmunĂŒ|goshashafarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashafarmunĂŒ|gokishashafarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashafarmushĂ«|shashafarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashafarnkmushĂ«|goshashafarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashafarmushĂ«|gokishashafarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashafarmuro|shashafarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashafarnkmuro|goshashafarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashafarmuro|gokishashafarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
